signup.title: Create Account
signup.description: Join the Aetheria global travel network.

hero.title: THE WORLD RECODED.
hero.subtitle: Eliminate logistics. Amplify immersion. Experience the first multi-agent AI travel ecosystem.
hero.description1: The first AI-native travel ecosystem for the digital nomad.
hero.description2: Synthesize your journey. Recode your reality.

features.title: NEURAL MODULES.
features.quote: "We don't just plan trips. We synthesize experiences using multi-agent neural grids."

itinerary.title: NEURAL ITINERARY
itinerary.desc: Synthesize multi-destination journeys with real-time logistics and cultural context.

postcard.title: POSTCARD STUDIO
postcard.desc: Generate high-fidelity visual memories using our proprietary neural rendering engine.

legends.title: LOCAL LEGENDS
legends.desc: Uncover hidden cultural nodes and underground history through our AR-enabled grid.

packing.title: PACKING ASSISTANT
packing.desc: Optimize your gear for any climate or terrain with AI-driven manifest analysis.

booking.title: Booking Hub
